The NFC Championship Game is the conference championship game of the NFC and is played once each year to determine the champion of the NFC, who then proceeds to the Super Bowl. This is a strategic decision by the coaching staff. - So this part is a standard football terminology and is plausible. 3. **NFC championship**: - The NFC Championship Game is a real event in the NFL. - It is part of the NFL playoffs and is played annually. - So this is a real event and context is plausible.
